allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: implement Phase 1 User CRUD frontend with Vue 3 Composition API

Implemented complete user management interface following Vue 3 Composition API patterns,
PrimeVue components, and Tailwind CSS styling. All code follows project standards with
TypeScript strict mode and composable-based architecture.

## Features Implemented
- User list page with DataTable \(pagination, sorting, filtering\)
- User detail page with view/edit toggle
- Create user dialog with form validation
- Edit user functionality
- Comprehensive error handling \(404, 409 conflict, validation errors\)

## Components Created
- UserCard: Reusable user display card with role badges
- UserForm: Dual-mode form \(create/edit\) with validation
- UsersPage: User list with DataTable and create dialog
- UserDetailPage: User detail view with edit capability

## Technical Implementation
- TypeScript types: User, CreateUserRequest, UpdateUserRequest, UserRole
- useUsers composable: Centralized API communication and state management
- Router: Added /users and /users/:id routes with lazy loading
- Error handling: User-friendly messages for all error scenarios
- Responsive design: Mobile-first with Tailwind breakpoints

## Testing
- Vitest unit tests for useUsers composable
- Vitest component tests for UserCard and UserForm
- Cypress E2E tests for complete user workflows

## Documentation
- Created implementation summary in ai-specs/changes/
- Updated README with Phase 1 features and endpoints
- All code documented with TypeScript types

## Notes
- Phase 1 has no authentication \(public routes\)
- Backend integration ready via ApiResponse<T> envelope
- Phase 2 will add JWT authentication and route guards

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
